items.name: Ulacylon Colossus Helmet
items.description:
(ADDED NOTE: DO NOT REUPLOAD UGC FROM THIS GROUP NO MATTER IF ITS PERSONAL USE)
The Colossus armor is a rendition of the original Juggernaut kit. 
Unlike its predecessor such armor was not made for mere entertainment but rather for total suppression of all opposing forces.

As such its updated armor, reconstructed and reinforced exoskeleton, and additional neck armor reflects this. 

(UMG members will need to refer to the adjustments posted in order to get it to look right.)
